> **Please do not file public security issues.** Use the private disclosure
> process described in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and email
> **security@peerx.com** instead.

## Vulnerability summary
One-paragraph description of the issue and impact.

## Affected versions
- PeerX version(s)

## Reproduction
Minimal steps, ideally with a PoC patch or script.

## Suggested remediation
Optional — your recommended fix.
